character_dossiers.name: Silver
character_dossiers.biography: Part of a group seeking treasure, negotiating with the captain.

character_dossiers.name: the captain
character_dossiers.biography: Leader of a group refusing to surrender the chart, threatening Silver.

character_dossiers.name: Long John
character_dossiers.biography: Member of the group dismissive of the captain's chart.

character_dossiers.name: Mr. Smollett
character_dossiers.biography: Intervenes in the conflict, threatens Silver.

character_dossiers.name: Abe Gray
character_dossiers.biography: Mentioned as a seaman attacked by Silver's men.

character_dossiers.name: Alexander Smollett
character_dossiers.biography: Captain of the group, confronts Silver.
